name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers at 1007 N Miami Blvd, Durham, NC 27703 in the East Durham neighborhood is open 24 hours daily. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.7 stars across 379 reviews. Call +1 919-887-2448.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates PLS Check Cashers as a multi-state financial services network with locations in Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The company positions itself as a convenience-focused alternative financial services provider serving underbanked and unbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash and financial services.

PLS offers a comprehensive suite of check-cashing and money services including check cashing, money orders, bill payment, wire transfers (via Ria Money Transfer), and government benefits access. Beyond traditional money services, they provide transportation-related services (vehicle registration, renewals, title transfers, license plates, and city stickers/transit cards), notary services, fax and copy services, ATM access, phone top-ups, cash and coin services, and a proprietary Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard. The company also operates a B2B division called PLS For Business and offers foreign exchange services.

PLS distinguishes itself through 24/7 operational hours across all service categories at their locations, recognizing that alternative financial services users often work non-traditional hours or need emergency access to services outside standard banking hours. Their integration of transportation services (DMV-related) alongside financial services is unusual in the check-cashing space and suggests partnerships or specialized licensing in certain states. The Xpectations! PLUS branded debit card and mobile app indicate movement toward digital financial products.

The primary limitation is that PLS remains fundamentally a check-cashing and alternative financial services provider, not a full-service bank. Consumers should understand that while 24/7 availability is valuable, check-cashing fees and money service costs typically exceed traditional banking. The company's recent privacy policy update indicates data collection practices that warrant consumer review. This service model works best for consumers without traditional bank accounts or those needing immediate cash access, but is not a long-term wealth-building financial solution.
pros: 24/7 hours of operation across all service categories at all locations
Multi-state presence with 12-state network providing geographic accessibility
Diverse service bundle combining check cashing, money orders, bill pay, and wire transfers in one location
Notary services available without requiring separate visit to legal or government office
Transportation services (registration, renewals, title transfers) integrated with financial services
Ria Money Transfer partnership provides international wire transfer capability
Government benefits access, serving consumers dependent on direct deposit and benefit disbursement
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard offers alternative to prepaid cards for check deposit recipients
cons: Check-cashing fees and money service charges are typically higher than traditional bank accounts
No credit-building products or credit history establishment tools offered
Limited to alternative financial services rather than comprehensive banking relationships
Recent privacy policy changes indicate expanded data collection and use practices requiring consumer review
Transportation services availability likely varies by state due to regulatory requirements, not uniformly accessible across network
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate check-to-cash conversion without bank account
Consumers working non-traditional hours requiring 24/7 financial services access
Multi-state travelers or people relocating frequently who need consistent service availability
Consumers combining financial services with DMV-related transportation needs in single trip
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check-to-cash conversion, bill payment, or money transfer services with the convenience of 24/7 availability. The main caveat is that check-cashing and money services carry inherent fees that make this a transaction-based model rather than a long-term financial solution; consumers seeking to build credit, reduce costs, or establish savings should prioritize opening a traditional bank account or credit union membership.
